ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Off Calendar

Declaration Of Albert Lee In Support Of Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Vanessa Deborah Marchi, a/k/a Vanessa Marchi, a/k/a Deborah Anne Marchi Friel, a/k/a Deborah Anne Marchi, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Plaintiff Albert Lee, Esq. appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Vanessa Deborah Marchi, a/k/a Vanessa Marchi, a/k/a Deborah Anne Marchi Friel, a/k/a Deborah Anne Marchi, an individual.
Plaintiff's first amended complaint was filed on March 3, 2014 and served on April 8, 2016.
Default was entered against defendant on April 17, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 21, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Albert Lee, and against the Defaulted Defendant Vanessa Deborah Marchi, a/k/a Vanessa Marchi, a/k/a Deborah Anne Marchi Friel, a/k/a Deborah Anne Marchi, an individual, as follows:

Damages - $344,067.99.
Prejudgment Interest - $274,588.64.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $500.20.

Total - $619,156.83.

Additionally, the $11,977.41 currently in Albert Lee's attorney client trust account shall belong to Albert Lee and he may withdraw it.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
